entityName: A Place Further than the Universe

metadata.entityName: A Place Further than the Universe

ingredients.name: JR Shinjuku East Exit Station Square
ingredients.localName: JR新宿駅 東口駅前広場
ingredients.address: 3 Chome-38-1 Shinjuku, Shinjuku City, Tokyo 160-0022, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The iconic plaza outside Shinjuku's east exit is where Mari spots Shirase holding her sign advertising for Antarctic expedition members, the chance encounter that sets the whole journey in motion.

ingredients.name: Ganso Aburado Tokyo Ramen Yokocho
ingredients.localName: 元祖油堂 油そば 東京ラーメン横丁店
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒104-0028 Tokyo, Chuo City, Yaesu, 2 Chome−10−1 地下街北 B1階 Ganso Aburado Tokyo Ramen Yokocho, 1号

ingredients.name: New Chitose Airport Station
ingredients.address: New Chitose Airport Station, Hokkaido, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: New Chitose Airport, depicted in episode 13, is where the girls return to Japan after the expedition, the arrivals scene carrying all the weight of what they experienced and lost in Antarctica.

ingredients.name: Ramen Tami-chan
ingredients.entityContext: A local ramen shop in Tatebayashi that appears as a background dining location in episode 5, part of the hometown Gunma scenery the girls inhabit before departing.

ingredients.name: Moritaya Branch
ingredients.localName: モリタ屋 丸の内店
ingredients.address: Moritaya, Marunouchi Building, ３５階 2 Chome-4-1 Marunouchi, Chiyoda City, Tokyo 100-0005, Japan

ingredients.name: Prepared Food Store Big Mom's Kitchen
ingredients.localName: 惣菜店 ビッグママーズキッチン

ingredients.name: Harumi-Futo
ingredients.address: Harumi-Futō, 5-chōme-8 Harumi, Chuo City, Tokyo 104-0053, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Harumi Wharf in Tokyo Bay is where the Shirase icebreaker departs in episode 5, the tearful, triumphant sendoff scene as the four girls finally set sail toward Antarctica.

ingredients.name: Suzuran Goya
ingredients.address: Suzuran Goya, Azumi, Matsumoto, Nagano 390-1513, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This mountain hut near Matsumoto doubles as the location where the crew prepares for cold conditions, used in episode 4 to depict the team's acclimatization training before departing for Antarctica.

ingredients.name: Isetan Tachikawa
ingredients.address: Isetan Tachikawa, 2 Chome-5-1 Akebonocho, Tachikawa, Tokyo 190-0012, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The girls shop at this Tachikawa department store to gather supplies and cold-weather gear for the expedition, an early scene showing them taking their Antarctic dream seriously.

ingredients.name: Polar Science Museum
ingredients.localName: 国立極地研究所 南極・北極科学館
ingredients.address: Polar Science Museum, １０-３ Midoricho, Tachikawa, Tokyo 190-8518, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The real National Institute of Polar Research museum in Tachikawa, depicted in episode 3 as the girls research Antarctic expeditions and meet contacts connected to JARE, bringing their mission one step closer to reality.

ingredients.name: Tatebayashi Hills Hotel
ingredients.address: Tatebayashi Hills Hotel, 1-7 Nakamachi, Tatebayashi, Gunma 374-0029, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This Tatebayashi hotel is one of the local accommodations depicted in episode 3 as part of the girls' hometown Gunma setting before they begin serious expedition preparations.

ingredients.name: Tatebayashi Grand Hotel
ingredients.address: Tatebayashi Grand Hotel, 1 Chome-22-2 Matsubara, Tatebayashi, Gunma 374-0016, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Featured in episode 3 among the Tatebayashi town locations, serving as recognizable local scenery in the Gunma hometown sequences.

ingredients.name: Café Renoir Shinjuku Kuyakusho Yoko
ingredients.localName: 喫茶室ルノアール 新宿区役所横店 (貸会議室)
ingredients.address: Renoir, １F・２F 1 Chome-3-5 Kabukicho, Shinjuku City, Tokyo 160-0021, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This Kabukicho-area cafe is where Mari, Shirase, Hinata and Yuzuki meet as a group for the first time, cementing their unlikely friendship and shared Antarctic dream.

ingredients.name: Japan Fresh Fish and Crustacean Society
ingredients.localName: 日本鮮魚甲殻類同好会

ingredients.name: Hidakaya Seibu Shinjuku Mae Kita
ingredients.localName: 日高屋 西武新宿前北店
ingredients.address: Hidakaya, 武井ビル 1 Chome-28-3 Kabukicho, Shinjuku City, Tokyo 160-0021, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This Kabukicho ramen chain appears in episode 2 as part of the busy Shinjuku streetscape the girls navigate during their evening together in the city.

ingredients.name: Gyuyoshi Shinjuku East Exit
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒160-0021 Tokyo, Shinjuku City, Kabukicho, 1 Chome−13−9 一丁目ビル 1階 牛吉 新宿東口店
ingredients.entityContext: Seen in episode 2 as part of the Kabukicho restaurant street where the four girls dine together, an energetic backdrop to their growing bond.

ingredients.name: Tori Beer Shinjuku
ingredients.address: Tori Beer Shinjuku, 良川ビルⅡ 1 Chome-11-4 Kabukicho, 新宿区 Shinjuku City, Tokyo 160-0021, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This Kabukicho izakaya is part of the lively Shinjuku night-out sequence in episode 2, one of several spots the girls pass as they celebrate being together.

ingredients.name: Oban-zushi
ingredients.address: Oban-zushi, 1 Chome-3-11 Kabukicho, Shinjuku City, Tokyo 160-0021, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This long-standing Kabukicho sushi restaurant appears in episode 2 as part of the Shinjuku dining district the girls explore during their night in the city.

ingredients.name: Shunsai Hanare
ingredients.address: Shunsai Hanare, 1 Chome-3-7 Kabukicho, Shinjuku City, Tokyo 160-0021, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Spotted in episode 2 among the Kabukicho restaurants as background scenery during the girls' Shinjuku outing.

ingredients.name: Ohjo Building
ingredients.address: Ohjo Building, 1 Chome-13-2 Kabukicho, Shinjuku City, Tokyo 160-0021, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The distinctive Ohjo Building in Kabukicho appears in episode 2 as a recognizable landmark framing the Shinjuku streets the girls walk through.

ingredients.name: FamilyMart Shinjuku Toho Bldg
ingredients.localName: ファミリーマート 新宿東宝ビル前店
ingredients.address: FamilyMart, １階, 1 Chome-14-7 Kabukicho, Shinjuku City, Tokyo 160-0021, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This convenience store next to the Toho Building in Kabukicho is visible in episode 2 during the girls' night in Shinjuku, a small detail that anchors the scene firmly in this part of Tokyo.

ingredients.name: Cash voucher shop access ticket Shinjuku
ingredients.localName: アクセスチケット新宿西口店
ingredients.address: Access Ticket Shinjuku Nishiguchi, 1 Chome-2-9 Nishishinjuku, Shinjuku City, Tokyo 160-0023, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The ticket resale shop near Shinjuku West Exit appears in episode 2 as the group hunts for discounted transport tickets, highlighting how the girls are scraping together every resource to fund their Antarctic dream.

ingredients.name: Moritsuru-do
ingredients.address: Meat Master Moritsuru, 273 Kurumamachi, Fushimi Ward, Kyoto, 612-8365, Japan

ingredients.name: Hotel Fine Inn Tatebayashi
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒374-0024 Gunma, Tatebayashi, Honcho, 2 Chome−7−18 HotelファインInn館林
ingredients.entityContext: One of the Tatebayashi hotels depicted in episode 2 as background town scenery establishing the quiet Gunma city the girls call home.

ingredients.name: Minato Machi Coffee Ten
ingredients.address: Minato Machi Coffee Ten, シーフロントビル 6-17 Showacho, Kure, Hiroshima 737-0027, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This harbor-front coffee shop in Kure, Hiroshima appears in episode 2 as one of the locations visited during the group's stop before boarding the expedition vessel, evoking the nautical setting of their departure.

ingredients.name: La Manon Cafe & Bar
ingredients.localName: 銀座カフェー＆バー LA MANON
ingredients.entityContext: This retro cafe in Tatebayashi appears in episode 1 as part of the town's nostalgic streetscape, adding to the quiet small-city atmosphere Mari inhabits before her journey begins.

ingredients.name: Tsutsujigaoka Park
ingredients.address: Tsutsujigaoka Park, 1 Chome-3-３０１-３外 Gorin, Miyagino Ward, Sendai, Miyagi 983-0842, Japan

ingredients.name: Lawson Tatebayashi Honcho 1-chome
ingredients.localName: ローソン 館林本町一丁目店
ingredients.address: Lawson Tatebayashi Honcho 1-chome, 1 Chome-1-1834-1 Honcho, Tatebayashi, Gunma 374-0024, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This Lawson convenience store in central Tatebayashi appears as a mundane neighborhood backdrop in episode 1, grounding the story in the everyday Gunma setting the girls are determined to escape.

ingredients.name: Morinji-Mae Station
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒374-0033 Morinji-Mae Station, 群馬県館林市堀工町１６２４
ingredients.entityContext: This small Tobu Sano Line station near Morinji temple is used in episode 1 to depict the girls' everyday suburban world in Tatebayashi, the ordinary backdrop that makes their Antarctic ambition feel all the more extraordinary.

ingredients.name: Morinji
ingredients.address: Morinji, 1570 Horikucho, Tatebayashi, Gunma 374-0033, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Morinji temple in Tatebayashi, Gunma is one of the key locations representing Hinata's and Mari's hometown, appearing in episode 1 to establish the quiet, ordinary life Mari longs to break free from.

ingredients.name: Tatebayashi Station East Exit Bus Waiting Area and Restrooms
ingredients.address: Tatebayashi Station, 2-chōme-1 Honchō, Tatebayashi, Gunma 374-0024, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Tatebayashi Station is the main local hub for Mari and Shirase in Gunma, featured in episode 1 as the familiar transit point they leave behind on their path to Antarctica.

ingredients.name: Tatebayashi Eki Higashiguchi Hiroba No Parking Lot
ingredients.localName: 館林駅東口広場の駐車場
ingredients.address: Tatebayashiekihigashiguchihirobano Parking Lot, 2 Chome-3-3 Honcho, Tatebayashi, Gunma 374-0024, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The east-exit plaza at Tatebayashi Station appears in episode 1, a familiar everyday spot that marks the boundary between the girls' ordinary lives and the adventure waiting beyond.

ingredients.name: Tachikawa Station
ingredients.address: 2 Chome Akebonocho, Tachikawa, Tokyo, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Tachikawa Station is a transit hub the girls use when visiting the Polar Science Museum and the JARE offices nearby, tying the suburban Tokyo leg of their preparation to the wider journey.

ingredients.name: Tokyo Station
ingredients.address: 1 Chome Marunouchi, Chiyoda City, Tokyo 100-0005, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Tokyo Station appears as the departure point when the group travels to Fremantle, Australia, marking the beginning of the real journey away from Japan.

ingredients.name: Kabukicho Main Gate
ingredients.localName: 歌舞伎町一番街アーチ
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-17 Kabukicho, Shinjuku City, Tokyo 160-0021, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The famous Kabukicho ichiban-gai arch gate in Shinjuku appears in episode 2 as the backdrop for the girls' night out together, capturing the vibrant Tokyo energy that contrasts with the vast Antarctic wilderness ahead.
